technologies.name: HSTS
technologies.description: HTTP Strict Transport Security (HSTS) informs browsers that the site should only be accessed using HTTPS.

attributes.name: DORA
attributes.pitch: Recenser, mettre en visibilité et faciliter la prescription de services d'insertion, adaptés aux besoins des bénéficiaires
